title: Dad dies it crashes tonight? — premonition #3 (Dec 21, 2019)
html:
TL;DR

  • One-line late-night note: "Dad dies it crashes tonight?" with the date 12-21-19 below. Title is a question; body is the date stamp.
  • Third dated dad death premonition in the corpus — sits between the August-25 "my dad dead 10:22 pm" (2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th) and the October-27 "a car crash with dad happening" (2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition).
  • The recurring vehicular-death image — "crashes tonight" + the October "car crash" — is the pattern: 17-year-old Yahir is rehearsing the specific how of his father's death repeatedly across 2019, four years before dad actually died.
  • The question-mark in the title is the new variable — "dies… crashes tonight?**" — Yahir is now half-asking, not half-stating. Dread has become a query he submits to the night.
  • Sits ten days after Brenda SAT and AP money note, which itself contained the Jordan Cove / unsustainable-future line — same week of stacking what-am-I-securing-against anxiety.

Notes

The note is structurally minimal — a question, then a date — and that's exactly its power. By the third premonition entry of 2019, the form has compressed: no sentence to set the scene, no description of where Yahir is. Just the proposition, posed as a question, time-stamped. The teen has built a private notation for the recurring dread.

The vehicle-death specificity matters. In 2019, Yahir's father drives Gtanos trucks for the family business. The August premonition timestamps a death ("10:22 pm Augusta 24th") without a mechanism; the October premonition names the mechanism ("car crash"); this December one collapses both: dies + crashes + tonight. The form is converging.

Dad does not die in 2019, 2020, or 2021. The actual death comes years later. But the premonition pattern is now a fully-formed cluster — three dated entries, each tighter than the last — which makes it one of the densest heightened perception threads in the early corpus.

Privacy note

The note discloses paternal-death anxiety; preserved verbatim because it's load-bearing for the premonition arc.

Connections

  • 2019 08 25 my dad dead augusta 24th — premonition #1
  • 2019 10 27 car crash with dad premonition — premonition #2
  • 2024 01 04 thoughts on 1323 dad in bad state — eventual real-state sibling
  • dad yahir · dad death premonitions · heightened perception trigger
  • gtanos · grants pass teen era · lineage as fate
  • 2019 12 12 talk to brenda — same-week sibling
